_publications._publicationTitle: Traditional and systems biology based drug discovery for the rare tumor syndrome neurofibromatosis type 2.

_contextSnippet: GSK2126458 was initially administered by daily oral gavage at 3 mg/kg/day, but subsequently decreased to 1.5 mg/kg/day due to significant GI toxicity
details: Initially administered at 3 mg/kg/day but reduced to 1.5 mg/kg/day due to significant GI toxicity in schwannoma model
